Make Lending Easy with Integrated Solar Financing

Enerflo integrates with the Top 5 Solar Lenders and has the most lender integrations in the market, making lending easy and enabling reps to get their customers to NTP faster -- all through Lendflo.

Explore everything you can do with Enerflo Integrated Lenders

Enerflo is always pushing the envelope on what’s possible, working closely with lenders to improve integrations and user experience.

Third Party Owned (TPO) Services

TPO services, including lease and PPA, can be added to solar deals that meet the criteria based on the state in which the homeowner resides.

Instant pricing and accurate quotes

Enerflo can provide accurate quotes for fully integrated finance partners, as well as for most non-integrated finance partners, based on partner, product and project cost criteria.

Compliant proposals and disclaimers

Enerflo dynamically incorporates finance provider disclaimers into the proposal and application, ensuring compliance.

Pre-fill application details

Enerflo is able to pre-fill required data points based on information already entered or known, saving time and repetitive manual entry.

Embed finance application

The entire finance application is embedded within Enerflo, eliminating the need for multiple logins to financier portals.

Email finance application

Finance applications can be quickly and easily emailed to the customer applicant from within Enerflo.

Embed finance docs for signature

Finance documents are all embedded within the Enerflo platform, saving time and creating a more streamlined experience for all involved parties.

Email finance docs for signature

Finance docs can be emailed for signature, with status tracking. Email is triggered by Enerflo.

Spanish translation for docs

Loan docs can be provided in Spanish for participating financiers.

Loan stip visibility

Enerflo provides stipulation updates in real time to keep the financing application process moving forward as quickly as possible.

Automatically send system details to financier

Enerflo automatically updates the application with system equipment and project details.

Automatically upload signed install agreement

Enerflo automatically uploads signed install agreements to the application.

Application status tracking

Enerflo can get updates on application status to assist with reporting and project submission.

Integrated change order support

Enerflo automatically integrates change orders and other project-related updates with the application.

Solar Financing Made Simple

Our deep integrations with the top solar lenders makes loan application, approvals and doc signing a breeze. Reps no longer need to login to multiple lending platforms. Everything can be done within Enerflo’s Lendflo platform.

Instant Quoting

Enerflo enables instant quoting for your lender products, taking into account project costs, adders, rebates and ITC calculations. Lender quotes are dynamically fed into Optimus, our proprietary (and industry game-changing!) proposal software for your customers.

Embedded Loan Apps

With embedded loan applications, sales reps never leave Enerflo to apply, get customers approved or sign loan documents. The entire process, start to finish, is completed within Enerflo, including alerts and status updates that keep your solar customers informed on the status of their loan, in real time.

System Details

Enerflo automatically updates loan applications with additional system, equipment and project details after the loan docs have been signed, ensuring the project and loan application are kept on track and in sync, getting the customer closer to NTP faster.

Non-Integrated Lenders

Working with credit unions or banks that don’t have APIs yet? Enerflo processes payment calculations for over 30 financial institutions and programs, so you can still quote effectively in your proposals. More and more lenders are understanding the benefits of 3rd party integrations, giving you and your customers more options over time.
